description: A colleague has left behind a broken Implicit Association Test (IAT) experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/iat_broken.psyexp designed to measure implicit racial bias using the standard Black-White IAT protocol (Greenwald, McGhee & Schwartz, 1998). Fix the experiment to ensure it correctly collects response times and accuracy for the compatible and incompatible association mappings across the standard 7 blocks. Add a required debriefing screen and save the corrected experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/iat_fixed.psyexp. Login: user ga, password password123

bugs: Block 3 and Block 4 are swapped in the Flow (incompatible before compatible instead of compatible first)
Practice block loop has nReps = 0 (no practice trials run)
Code component for response mapping uses = instead of == in if-statement (syntax/logic error)
Text component color references '$category_color' but conditions column is named 'stim_color'
Data filename in Settings uses 'participant' variable without the $ prefix (logs as literal string)
metadata.required_addition: A 'debrief' routine must be added at the end of the flow
